_instructions.title: 👋 WELCOME! READ THIS FIRST
_instructions.note: You can edit the content below to update the website. Please follow these simple rules:
rules: 1. Do not delete the quotation marks ( " ) around text.
2. Do not delete the colons ( : ) between the names and values.
3. Do not delete the curly brackets { } or square brackets [ ].
4. Be careful with commas ( , ). Every item in a list needs a comma after it, EXCEPT the last one.
5. If you break the file, the website will show an error. Double-check your changes against a backup.

weeklyResources.title: Is There More To Life Than This?
weeklyResources._note: 👇 This is the template for a week. Copy this block if you want to add a new week!

talk.title: Is There More To Life Than This?

icebreaker.title: Icebreaker
content: Say your name with an adjective that starts with the same letter as your name.
It can describe you or just be something fun.
For example: 'Gentle George,' 'Brilliant Bella,' or 'Curious Chloe.'
Each person has to repeat everyone's name and adjective who came before them—then add their own!

discussion.title: Discussion Questions
content: How and why did you end up coming to Alpha?
If it turned out there was a God after all, and you could ask one question, what would it be?
What do you think about the idea of there being a spiritual side to life?
What aspects of the evidence presented tonight did you find convincing/not convincing?

tips.title: Tips
content: Arrive early. Make guests feel welcomed and cared for.
Avoid discussing religion over dinner. There's plenty of time for that in the weeks ahead.
Finish on time.

icebreaker.title: Icebreaker
content: If you were stuck on a desert island and you could take one thing (not a person) with you,
You already have the Bible and the complete works of Shakespeare,
What would you take and why?

discussion.title: Discussion Questions
content: What makes you happy?
What do you think about Jesus? / How do you feel about Jesus?
If you had a chance to meet Jesus, how would you feel and what would you say to him?
What aspects of the evidence presented tonight did you find convincing/not convincing?

tips.title: Tips
content: Arrive early. Make guests feel welcomed and cared for.
Avoid discussing religion over dinner. There's plenty of time for that in the weeks ahead.
Finish on time.

icebreaker.title: Icebreaker
content: Share about a time when someone did something unexpectedly kind for you.
How did it make you feel?
Did it change your perspective in any way?

discussion.title: Discussion Questions
content: What does the word 'forgiveness' mean to you?
Have you ever had to forgive anyone?
Has anyone had to forgive you?
How do you feel about the idea of God forgiving you?

tips.title: Tips
content: Arrive early. Make guests feel welcomed and cared for.
Avoid discussing religion over dinner. There's plenty of time for that in the weeks ahead.
Finish on time.

icebreaker.title: Icebreaker
content: What's something you believe in that you can't see or prove scientifically?
How did you come to believe in it?
What gives you confidence in this belief?

discussion.title: Discussion Questions
content: What does it mean to have faith?
How can you have faith in someone you can't see?
What do you think about the idea of faith being a step based on evidence rather than a blind leap?
How do you feel about placing your trust in God?
What do you think about the idea of having a relationship with Jesus?

tips.title: Tips
content: Arrive early. Make guests feel welcomed and cared for.
Avoid discussing religion over dinner. There's plenty of time for that in the weeks ahead.
Finish on time.

weeklyResources.title: Why and How Do I Pray?

talk.title: Why and How Do I Pray?

icebreaker.title: Icebreaker
content: Have you ever had a conversation that changed your life?
What was it about?
What made it so impactful?

discussion.title: Discussion Questions
content: Has anyone ever tried praying? How did you get on? (Or, Do you know anyone who has tried praying?)
What do you think about the idea of God answering prayer?

tips.title: Tips
content: Arrive early. Make guests feel welcomed and cared for.
Avoid discussing religion over dinner. There's plenty of time for that in the weeks ahead.
Finish on time.

weeklyResources.title: Why and How Should I Read the Bible?

talk.title: Why and How Should I Read the Bible?

icebreaker.title: Icebreaker
content: What's a book that has significantly influenced your life?
What did you learn from it?
Would you recommend it to others? Why or why not?

discussion.title: Discussion Questions
content: Has anyone ever tried reading any of the Bible or heard it being read? How did you find it?
How do you feel about the idea of God speaking through the Bible?
Have you read anything in the Bible that has challenged an aspect of your beliefs or behaviour?

tips.title: Tips
content: Arrive early. Make guests feel welcomed and cared for.
Avoid discussing religion over dinner. There's plenty of time for that in the weeks ahead.
Finish on time.

icebreaker.title: Icebreaker
content: Share about a time you received good advice that helped you make an important decision.
Who gave you the advice?
How did you know to trust it?

discussion.title: Discussion Questions
content: What made you decide to do Alpha?
If you could ask God a question, what would you ask?
Bonus question: Before you heard the talk tonight, what was your concept of Jesus? Has it changed? If so, why?

tips.title: Tips
content: Invite your guest to join a Connect Group. Share the link.
Share HTBB service time. 9.30 am, 11.30 am, 5.00 pm
Encourage guest to fill in the survey. Share QR code.
